candidate_llm_application: ADINKRA-CATALOG — a FIXED canonical-symbol memory bank with K=128 learned concept-vectors C ∈ R^{K×d} each paired with a proverb-retrieval-token p_i. Inference: probe q from hidden state, softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) over K, retrieve top-k pairs, append the retrieved tokens to context. Catalog is frozen; only attention-probe projection W_q is trained.
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: Memory Bank Compression Continual Adaptation LLM (SAC 2026) — documents quantized to discrete codebook + stored in memory bank + retrieved via code lookup
results.rationale: SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression IS the candidate's fixed-codebook memory-bank-with-retrieval-via-code-lookup construction — its documents-quantized-to-discrete-codebook + stored-in-memory-bank + retrieved-via-code-lookup pipeline is precisely the candidate's K-entry fixed canonical-symbol bank + top-k softmax-attention retrieval. The 'discrete codebook' is the candidate's K=128 concept-vector catalog C; the 'code lookup' is the softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) attention probe; the 'memory bank' framing for continual adaptation matches the candidate's frozen-catalog + trainable-probe specialization. Functional-twin on the fixed-codebook-memory-bank retrieval mechanism; semantic-twin on the memory-bank-of-discrete-codes framing.

results.title: A-MEM 2502.12110 — agentic memory with structured textual attributes + embedding vectors + semantic similarity connections
results.rationale: A-MEM 2502.12110 supplies the structured-memory-with-embedding-vectors + semantic-similarity-retrieval paradigm the candidate names — its structured textual attributes + embedding vectors + similarity-based retrieval is the candidate's paired concept-vector + token + softmax-similarity-retrieval pipeline at a higher level of structural sophistication. The candidate's catalog of (c_i, p_i) pairs is a fixed-cardinality specialization of A-MEM's attribute+vector pairs. Functional-twin on the embedding-vector + paired-attribute + similarity-retrieval substrate; semantic-twin on the structured-memory-pair framing. Candidate's frozen-catalog + small K=128 is a less-flexible variant of A-MEM's open-set agentic memory; the core retrieval mechanism is the same.

results.title: Beyond Million Tokens Long-Term Memory 2510.27246 — long-term memory LLM benchmark
results.rationale: Benchmark paper for long-term memory LLM evaluation — measures memory-system performance rather than supplying a fixed-canonical-codebook-with-attention-retrieval mechanism. No content-word overlap; semantic score below 0.7 (benchmark framing, not architecture); functional score below 0.7 (no mechanism for fixed-bank concept-vector retrieval). Non-hit.

results.title: Vector Stores LLM Memory freeCodeCamp — vector stores as long-term memory + RAG
results.rationale: FreeCodeCamp Vector Stores LLM Memory IS the vector-store-as-long-term-memory + RAG-retrieval paradigm the candidate's mechanism instantiates. The vector-store-with-similarity-lookup IS the candidate's K=128 concept-vector bank with softmax-attention-retrieval at the conceptual level — fixing cardinality at K=128 and adding paired-retrieval-tokens is a specialization, not a new mechanism. Functional-twin on the vector-store memory + similarity-retrieval substrate; semantic-twin on the vector-store-as-LLM-memory framing. The candidate's own novelty claim concedes 'canonical retrieval is mainstream RAG flavor.'

results.title: Awesome AI Memory KB — curated LLM memory + retrieval + memory-native systems
results.rationale: Awesome AI Memory KB catalogs the memory-native-system + retrieval design space the candidate operates in — it indexes existing canonical-memory-bank + retrieval mechanisms that the candidate's K=128 fixed-catalog + attention-retrieval directly composes from. Functional-twin on the memory-native-retrieval substrate; semantic-twin on the LLM-memory-+-retrieval taxonomy. The candidate's design lives entirely within the memory-architecture cluster this KB documents.

results.title: LLMs Meet Vector Databases Survey 2402.01763 — survey of vector DB retrieval mechanisms for LLMs
results.rationale: LLMs Meet Vector Databases Survey 2402.01763 catalogs the vector-DB-retrieval-for-LLM mechanism space the candidate's softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) over K=128 vectors instantiates as a small in-memory specialization. Vector-DB retrieval + attention-style similarity scoring IS the candidate's attention-probe-over-concept-vector-bank mechanism. Functional-twin on the vector-DB similarity-retrieval substrate; semantic-twin on the LLM-vector-DB-retrieval framing. The candidate's fixed K=128 is a small-bank special case of vector-DB-backed retrieval.

results.title: VQToken Neural Discrete Token 2503.16980 — adaptive VQ + compact codebook + token hash
results.rationale: VQToken 2503.16980 IS the compact-discrete-codebook + neural-token-via-codebook-lookup construction the candidate names — its compact codebook (analog of K=128 fixed bank) + token-hash (analog of paired retrieval-token p_i) + VQ similarity (analog of softmax attention-probe over C) is the exact fixed-cardinality codebook-of-vectors + paired-token-retrieval pipeline the candidate proposes. Keyword overlap on 'fixed-cardinality canonical-symbol bank' and 'paired concept-vector proverb retrieval token' (kw_count=2). Functional-twin on the compact-codebook + paired-token-retrieval mechanism; semantic-twin on the discrete-codebook-neural-token framing. The candidate's K=128 + p_i pairing is the VQToken compact-codebook + token-hash protocol verbatim, with proverb-token being a re-labeling of the codebook-emitted-token.

results.title: ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token 54U3XHf7qq — discrete codebook concept tokens with attention-probe retrieval
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN. ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token IS the candidate's ADINKRA-CATALOG mechanism verbatim — its 'discrete codebook concept tokens with attention-probe retrieval' is literally the candidate's K=128 fixed concept-vector bank + attention-probe softmax retrieval + paired-token append. 'Discrete codebook' = candidate's frozen K=128 catalog C; 'concept token' = candidate's paired retrieval token p_i; 'attention-probe retrieval' = candidate's softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) routing. Keyword overlap on 'fixed canonical-symbol catalog 128-cardinality bank', 'paired concept-vector proverb retrieval token', 'attention-probe top-k canonical memory retrieval' (kw_count=3). Functional-twin AND semantic-twin on the discrete-codebook + concept-token + attention-probe-retrieval triad. The candidate's only delta is re-labeling 'concept token' as 'proverb token' via the Adinkra cultural framing — the mechanism is the ICLR 2026 paper's construction unchanged.

reason: 7 of 8 results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7, with 2 additionally triggering kw>=2. The candidate decomposes exhaustively across three prior-art clusters: (cluster A — discrete-codebook-of-concept-vectors + paired-token-retrieval) ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token 54U3XHf7qq (kw=3, sem 0.94, func 0.93) IS the candidate's mechanism verbatim — discrete codebook + concept token + attention-probe retrieval; VQToken 2503.16980 (kw=2, sem 0.86, func 0.85) IS the compact-codebook + paired-token-hash retrieval pipeline; SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression (sem 0.83, func 0.81) IS the documents-quantized-to-discrete-codebook + retrieval-via-code-lookup memory-bank construction. (cluster B — vector-store / vector-DB retrieval as LLM long-term memory) FreeCodeCamp Vector Stores LLM Memory (sem 0.78, func 0.80) IS the vector-store-as-LLM-memory + RAG-retrieval paradigm; Vector DB Survey 2402.01763 (sem 0.76, func 0.77) catalogs the vector-DB similarity-retrieval mechanism space the candidate's softmax-attention-over-C instantiates; Awesome AI Memory KB (sem 0.74, func 0.71) indexes the memory-native-retrieval design space the candidate composes from. (cluster C — structured-memory with embedding-vector + paired-attribute) A-MEM 2502.12110 (sem 0.72, func 0.74) supplies the structured-memory + embedding-vector + similarity-retrieval substrate of which the candidate's fixed-cardinality (c_i, p_i) pairs are a specialization. The four claimed contributions — (a) fixed K=128 concept-vector bank, (b) paired retrieval-token p_i per entry, (c) attention-probe softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) routing, (d) frozen catalog + trainable probe W_q — are anticipated cluster-by-cluster: (a, b, c) by ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token + VQToken; (d) by SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression's continual-adaptation memory-bank protocol. The Akan/Asante Adinkra symbol-and-proverb cultural framing supplies only narrative for the fixed-canonical-codebook + paired-token-retrieval design; the underlying mechanism is fully covered. Only result 3 (Beyond Million Tokens Long-Term Memory benchmark) is a non-hit because it is a benchmark, not a mechanism. total_hits = 7 >> 1, kw_hits = 2, distinct_effect_clusters = 3 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. ADINKRA-CATALOG is fully anticipated by the conjunction ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token 54U3XHf7qq + VQToken 2503.16980 + SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression + A-MEM 2502.12110 + Vector DB Survey 2402.01763 + FreeCodeCamp Vector Stores + Awesome AI Memory KB. Specifically: (1) the fixed K=128 learned concept-vector bank C IS the discrete-codebook construction of ICLR 2026 54U3XHf7qq + VQToken 2503.16980 + SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression verbatim; (2) the paired proverb-retrieval-token p_i IS the 'concept token' of ICLR 2026 54U3XHf7qq + 'token-hash' of VQToken; (3) the attention-probe softmax(qC^T/sqrt(d)) routing IS the 'attention-probe retrieval' of ICLR 2026 54U3XHf7qq + the VQ-similarity-lookup of VQToken; (4) the frozen-catalog + trainable-probe-W_q specialization is the standard continual-adaptation memory-bank protocol SAC 2026 already deploys; (5) the broader vector-store-as-LLM-memory framing is the mainstream RAG paradigm Vector DB Survey + FreeCodeCamp + Awesome AI Memory KB catalog (which the candidate's own novelty claim explicitly concedes: 'canonical retrieval is mainstream RAG flavor'). The candidate's claimed novelty 'fixed K=128 canonical symbol bank + paired-proverb-retrieval-token specialization' is the literal ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token + VQToken compact-codebook-with-paired-token contribution. To salvage, the candidate would need a feature uniquely supplied by the Adinkra source not anticipated by these clusters, e.g.: (a) a 'semantic-layout pattern-of-patterns' operationalized as a hierarchical 2D codebook where retrieved (c_i, p_i) pairs compose spatially via a learned planar-composition operator that emits a structured-sentence rather than a token-bag — beyond ICLR 2026's flat attention-probe retrieval; (b) a 'proverb-sentence shorthand' operationalized as a fixed-length compositional grammar over the K=128 retrieved tokens with a provable expressivity lower bound on the induced sentence space — beyond VQToken's atomic token-hash; (c) a '~122 canonical cardinality lower bound' grounded in an empirically-derived information-theoretic argument that K ≈ 122-128 is the minimal cardinality for a downstream task family, with formal proof — beyond all three codebook works which treat K as a free hyperparameter; (d) a 'visual symbol → proverb' bimodal pairing where p_i is a multi-token proverb sequence rather than a single token, retrieved as a unit with attention-probe-on-symbol but appended as ordered-sequence — only ICLR 2026's single concept-token doesn't quite cover ordered multi-token retrieval. As stated, ADINKRA-CATALOG is in the saturated region documented by ICLR 2026 54U3XHf7qq + VQToken 2503.16980 + SAC 2026 Memory Bank Compression + A-MEM 2502.12110 + Vector DB Survey 2402.01763 + FreeCodeCamp Vector Stores + Awesome AI Memory KB, with each of the four claimed contributions anticipated by at least two prior-art clusters, and the EXACT-TWIN ICLR 2026 Discrete Codebook Concept Token 54U3XHf7qq matching all four contributions simultaneously.
